evals.prompt: Create a Marp deck in slides/deck.md for an internal engineering update. The audience is backend and platform engineers. Turn a rough outline into a 7-slide deck with frontmatter, clear slide titles, one section divider, and a recommended workspace layout for images and exports. Keep styling requests minimal and focus on structure.
evals.expected_output: A runnable Marp deck with valid frontmatter, sensible slide flow, and paths that fit a practical slide project layout.

evals.prompt: Rewrite a long Markdown project proposal into Marp slides. Use headingDivider only if the source headings already map cleanly to slides; otherwise rewrite into shorter presentation-sized slides. Include notes on where screenshots should live and how to export to PDF and PPTX.
evals.expected_output: A Marp-oriented transformation strategy or deck that uses slide-sized content, references image folders, and includes accurate export guidance.

evals.prompt: Set up a new Marp presentation workspace for a product launch. I want deck.md, a place for custom themes, image assets, and generated exports. Give me the folder structure, a starter deck, and examples of Marp background image syntax for a hero slide and a split layout slide.
evals.expected_output: A concrete Marp workspace recommendation, starter Markdown, and correct examples of background image syntax.
